Incredible India Tour Packages

Discover the beauty, culture and diversity of India — from snow-capped peaks to golden beaches.

❄️ Paradise on Earth
From ₹18,000

Kashmir

Dal Lake shikaras, Gulmarg snowfields, Pahalgam valleys & the magical gardens of Mughal royalty.

6N/7DHouseboat StayShikara RideGulmarg Cable Car

🌴 God's Own Country
From ₹14,000

Kerala

Alleppey backwaters, Munnar tea gardens, Thekkady wildlife & the serene Kovalam beaches.

₹14,000/person Book Now
🏖️ Beach Paradise
From ₹10,000

Goa

Golden beaches, Portuguese heritage, spice plantations, watersports & vibrant nightlife of North & South Goa.

From ₹8,000

₹15,000/person Book Now
🕌 Wonder of World
From ₹6,000

Agra

The iconic Taj Mahal at sunrise, Agra Fort, Fatehpur Sikri & the timeless story of eternal love.

₹6,000/person Book Now

From ₹5,000

Amritsar

From ₹7,000

₹7,000/person Book Now
